revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''.5-4-145

A.C. tacho-generator

An a.c. generator which generates an a.c. output voltage whose amplitude and frequency are proportional to the speed. It may have either a permanent magnet or a d.c. field winding.

Reference: I.E.C. (modified)
